items.name: Moon Light Great Sword
items.description: A mythical blade said to fall from the heavens like a shard of moonlight. Legends speak of a wandering knight who forged the sword from crystallized stardust, giving it a core of pure, living energy. When drawn, the blade glows with a cold blue radiance, humming with power as if it longs to strike down darkness itself. Some say the sword chooses its wielder, responding only to those with unwavering resolve. In the hands of a true warrior, each swing releases a wave of lunar brilliance capable of cutting through fear, fate, and even destiny. This is not just a weapon — it is a symbol of clarity, courage, and the calm strength of the silent night. Wield it with honor. Shine with purpose. Become the one who carries the light.

items.name: Olive OV-2A Helmet
items.description:
Since the Mk-22s addition to the BDO arsenal, development of affordable power armor have been in production oversight by the company's Overseer. Adopted after the final trials, this armor has a built in miniature reactor core capable of long lasting power while operating. The suit itself is vacuum sealed to offer protection while operating in space, but also protects against dangerous gasses.
